articles.title: Are Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce attending the Knicks vs Spurs NBA Finals game at Madison Square Garden?
articles.description: Pop superstar Taylor Swift is reportedly attending a New York Knicks game at Madison Square Garden. This appearance fuels strong speculation that the venue will host her wedding to Travis Kelce on July 4th. Sources suggest a large guest list and strict secrecy surrounding the event. Swift has a long-standing connection to the Knicks, dating back to 2014.

articles.title: IND vs AFG: Rohit Sharma’s Wholesome Gesture to Young Fan Ahead of ODI Series Goes Viral (WATCH)
articles.description: Rohit Sharma has rejoined the Indian squad in Chandigarh for the upcoming ODI series against Afghanistan after recovering from a hamstring injury. Ahead of the series, a heartwarming video of him inviting a young fan onto the team bus for a selfie went viral. With other senior players absent, all eyes are on Rohit to lead the batting lineup.

articles.title: Novak Djokovic’s luxury watch collection: Inside champion's elite taste
articles.description: The 2026 watch collection of Novak Djokovic is proof of the tennis legend’s passion for premium craftsmanship and exclusive taste. Hailing from a seasoned Grand Slam player, he has several coveted watches that fit his rich life and international fame. All ranging from his signature Hublot GOAT Edition to the prized Rolex and Audemars Piguet watches.

articles.title: Trump Infuriates Americans With UFC Arena 'Light Show' At White House Before Birthday Fight Event
articles.description: Donald Trump's planned UFC event at the White House is drawing major backlash as a massive octagon arena rises on the South Lawn ahead of the June 14 celebration, which coincides with the U.S. President's 80th birthday. Critics have branded the spectacle a 'circus', while supporters call it a historic part of America's 250th anniversary festivities. The event also faces a legal challenge over the use of federal land and environmental concerns. Here's everything we know about the White House UFC showdown, the controversy, ticket demand, fight card and growing political debate.
